name: Shoot Some Fish!
description: Become a fearless worm on a mission in Shoot Some Fish! After losing his family to hungry fish, our hero fights back! Dangling from a fishing hook, armed with a harpoon, he battles through 10 intense levels. Fish grow faster and smarter, making survival a real challenge. Use strategy and reflexes to claim victory and teach the fish a lesson they won&rsquo;t forget!
instructions: Use Mouse Swipe to shoot Shoot fish dodge attacks and survive with 5 lives 10 challenging levels 7 unique fish with different speeds Day amp night underwater settings
tags: Action, angry, arrow, Defense, Fish, Kill, Killing, Shooting, Skill
